sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17969" key="au)totra/pezos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αὐτο-τράπεζος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>,</foreign> <sense id="n17969.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">eating at the same table with,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀθανάτοις</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1342.tlg001:147:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Emp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">147.1</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
